case_title: MACADAM COMPUTERS, INC. VS AGUILAR, ANNALISA

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO AUG-13-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-06-1999 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACADAM COMPUTERS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUILAR, ANNALISA $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $415.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY MACADAM COMPUTERS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, ANNALISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-13-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-17-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT AGUILAR, ANNALISA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MACADAM COMPUTERS, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
